---
title: "Issue Update"
date: today
format:
  gfm:
    preview-mode: raw
---

<!-- 
USAGE
─────
1. Copy this file to issues/[slug]/ — NEVER edit the template directly
2. Rename: YYYY-MM-DD-[phase].qmd  (e.g. 2026-03-20-rca.qmd)
3. Fill in only the sections relevant to today's update; delete or comment out the others
4. Render:
     quarto render issues/[slug]/YYYY-MM-DD-[phase].qmd --to gfm
5. Submit:
     gh issue comment [number] --body-file issues/[slug]/YYYY-MM-DD-[phase].md
-->

## Update — `YYYY-MM-DD`

**Phase:** <!-- RCA | Fix | Validation | Mixed -->  
**Status:** <!-- In Progress | Resolved | Needs Follow-up -->

---

## Root Cause Analysis

<!-- Delete this section if not applicable to this update -->

### Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what went wrong and why -->

### Diagnostic Steps

<!-- Ordered list of what you checked and how -->

1. 
2. 

### Key Evidence

<!-- Paste relevant log snippets, error output, or file paths as fenced blocks -->

**`.nextflow.log` excerpt:**

```
# paste excerpt here
```

**`.command.err` (`work/xx/yyyyyy...`):**

```
# paste excerpt here
```

**`.command.log`:**

```
# paste excerpt here
```

### Confirmed Root Cause

<!-- State the root cause explicitly and concisely -->

---

## Solution

<!-- Delete this section if not applicable to this update -->

### Approach

<!-- Describe the fix strategy before showing code -->

### Changes Made

<!-- Use one fenced block per file or config change; label each with a comment or heading -->

**`nextflow.config` — executor / resource change:**

```groovy
// before

// after
```

**`modules/[process].nf` — process-level change:**

```groovy
// before

// after
```

**Other files / commands:**

```bash
# e.g. parameter tweak, file moved, env corrected
```

### Rationale

<!-- Why this fix addresses the root cause; any trade-offs -->

---

## Validation

<!-- Delete this section if not applicable to this update -->

### Test Run

**Command:**

```bash
nextflow run main.nf \
  -profile [profile] \
  [params]
```

**Executor:** <!-- local | slurm | lsf | sge | aws | google -->  
**Resume from cache:** <!-- yes (-resume) | no (clean run) -->

### Results

**Exit status:** <!-- 0 = success -->

```
# nextflow run summary / completion message
```

**Output verification:**

```bash
# ls / head / md5sum or other spot-checks
```

### Pass / Fail

- [ ] Pipeline completed without error
- [ ] Output files present and non-empty
- [ ] Results consistent with expected behaviour
- [ ] No regression in previously passing steps

### Remaining Concerns

<!-- Note any edge cases, follow-up issues, or open questions -->

---

*Comment generated from `comment.qmd` template · nemascan-sims-nf issue workflow*
